TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_imuy2

S.FORM: yau sunis ‘nay tmayta tu biat ‘nay tu niquduanna ta niquduanna ta nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩看著養在瓶子裡的青蛙。
There is a child looking at the frog kept in the bottle.

S.FORM: yau ti wasu a yau situRtuRku.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗低頭看了看。
There was a dog lowering its head.

S.FORM: maynep ti sunis ‘nay atu wasu ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: 孩子和狗睡著了。
The child and the dog fell asleep.

S.FORM: mzukat ti ‘nay biat a yau pasa tati.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙跑出去了。
That frog went out.

S.FORM: nani titaanna qaniyau tu taRbabi.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們早上一看,
Then they saw in the morning.

S.FORM: titaan na sunis ‘nay tu taRbabi.
S.TRANSL: 早上小孩子一看，
That child saw in the morning.

S.FORM: mai ti ‘nay biat a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙不在了。
That frog wasn’t there.

S.FORM: mai ti ya biat a yau ta peRaskuan nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙不在瓶子裡。
The frog wasn’t in the bottle.

S.FORM: paqisuRanna ti na wasu a yau tapeRaskuan ‘nay uRuna tu.
S.TRANSL: 小狗把頭塞到瓶子裡面了。
The dog stuffed his head into the bottle.

S.FORM: wiya ti qaniyau qumRaRas tu biat a yau atu wasu a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們走出去叫那隻青蛙，那隻狗也是。
They left to call that frog, and so did the dog.

S.FORM: qemi qemi tmibuq ti ya wasu ‘nay pasa libeng.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗往下掉。
That dog fell down.

S.FORM: nani mabedung ti ya peRasku ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: 然後瓶子破了。
Then that bottle was broken.

S.FORM: qumenut ti ya lazatna na na wasu a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗的主人生氣了。
The owner of that dog was angry.

S.FORM: supaR qaya wasu ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 還好那隻狗懂得。
(Fortunately,) that dog knew (it).

S.FORM: sisidamanna ti na wasu a yau ‘nay lazatna.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗舔主人。
That dog licked its owner.

S.FORM: yau ti taizaan qumeqeRas tu biat a yau ya sunis ‘nay atu wasu ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子跟狗在那裡一直叫青蛙。
That child and that dog were calling to the frog.

S.FORM: nani sunis a yau nani situRku tu ‘nay tangan na mutun tamedanayan.
S.TRANSL: 然後，那小孩往下看地上的老鼠洞。
Then the child looked down at the mouse hole on the ground.

S.FORM: mzukat ti ya was ‘nay mutun ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那隻老鼠出來了。
That mouse came out.

S.FORM: yau ti utuzanna ti na wasu a yau ya paRin ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗搖了搖那棵樹。
That dog was shaking the tree.

S.FORM: mzukat ti ya penay ‘nay ‘nay tuliq a yau.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂(虎頭蜂)都出來了。
Those bees (and wasps) came out.

S.FORM: tu tmibuq ti ‘nay tuliq ‘nay tamedanayan nani.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂(窩)掉下來了。
The beehive fell to the ground.

S.FORM: mzukat a mutun a yau qaya.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠也出來了。
The mouse went out too.

S.FORM: tu yau ti sunis ‘nay tmuqaz pasazi ta tabunguRanna na paRin ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩過來樹根那裡,然後爬上去。
That child came toward the roots and then climbed up (the tree).

S.FORM: tmayta tu ‘nay tanganna na peRasna paRin.
S.TRANSL: (他)看著那個樹洞。
And (he) looked at the hole of the tree.

S.FORM: nani situRtuRkuanna tmayta nani mzukat ti ya usiq ‘nay ku ‘nay tatanganan na paRin nani.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩低頭探了探，看到一隻在樹洞裡的貓頭鷹出來了。
He looked down and saw an owl in the tree hole come out.

S.FORM: muRetut sunis ‘nay tmibuq ta medanayan.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩嚇得掉到地上。
The child was frightened and fell to the ground.

S.FORM: nani tanuzanna ti na tuliq a yau ya wasu ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗被虎頭蜂追。
The dog was chased by the wasps.

S.FORM: nani wiya ti mRaRiw ‘nay wasu a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻狗就跑走了。
Then the dog ran away.

S.FORM: yau ti ya ‘nay ku ‘nay ni tmanuz tyu tu sunis a yau qaya nani.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹也追小孩子。
There was the owl chasing the child too.

S.FORM: Raynguanna tu ‘nay iza sayza u ‘nay luqanaw Rana ‘nay siRemuq ‘nay ni imetanna ay nani.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道他摸的是(某物)鹿。
He didn’t know what he touched was (something or) a deer.

S.FORM: tu wiya ti panmeng ti mzaqis tababawanna na tatuRuzanna na siRemuq a yau.
S.TRANSL: (小孩)只好爬到鹿的背上。
(The child) went to climb onto the back of the deer.

S.FORM: Raynguanna tu siRemuq sayza paRin zinna.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道那是鹿，以為那是木頭。
He didn’t know it was a deer and thought it might be a piece of wood.

S.FORM: nani yau wasu ‘nay tatuRuzanna na iza ‘nay na siRemuq a yau.
S.TRANSL: 狗在某物 ... 鹿的後面。
The dog is behind something ... the deer.

S.FORM: tu yau ti ta wak wakianna tawakianna na siRemuq ‘nay sunis ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在鹿角上。 ...
The child was on the horns of the deer ... .

S.FORM: Raynguanna tu uRu na siRemuq sayza ‘nay siRemuq a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩不知道那是鹿的頭。
He didn’t know that was the deer's head.

S.FORM: tu wiya ti masengat ti ya siRemuq ‘nay wiya ti mRaRiw.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿站起來跑走了。
The deer got up and ran away.

S.FORM: nani masulun tu wasuna ‘nay siRemuq a yau.
S.TRANSL: 鹿和狗一起跑了。
The deer ran with the dog.

S.FORM: tu Raynguanna sayza tu iza u tu nianu ‘nay niwuzunganku zinna sayza na siRemuq a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: (鹿)不知道自己扛什麼。牠可能想著:「我扛的是什麼?」
(The deer) did not know what it shouldered. It may think, ‘What did I shoulder?’

S.FORM: muRetut ti ta izaan tu maseq taqidisan tu.
S.TRANSL: (鹿)嚇到了,然後到了斜坡。
(It) was frightened. Then it arrived at the slope.

S.FORM: tmibuq ti ya sunis ‘nay atu wasu a yau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗掉了下來。
The child and the dog fell down.

S.FORM: tu wiya ti pasazi ti tayan ta iRuRan tazanzanuman a wasu a zau atu sunis ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 小孩跟狗離開，往河水走去。
The child and the dog left and went toward the river/water.

S.FORM: nani wuzunganna ti pamuquanna na sunis ‘nay ‘nay suni ‘nay wasu a yau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子背著那條狗。
The child carried that dog on the shoulders.

S.FORM: nani yau ti qalimka zinna tu tu wasu a yau na sunis ‘nay tayan ta paRinan ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 在那根木頭上，那個小孩子對他的狗說 :「安靜一點！」
On the wood, the child said to his dog, ‘Be quiet!’

S.FORM: tu yau ti mzaqis ta babawan na paRin ‘nay sunis ‘nay atu wasu.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩跟狗爬上那根木頭。
The child and the dog got onto the wood.

S.FORM: tu yau tababawan na wasu na paRin ‘nay ya qaniyau atu wasu a yau.
S.TRANSL: 他們在木頭上。
They were on the wood.

S.FORM: nani titaanna yau a biat ‘nay uzusa tawnayan.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到那裡有兩隻青蛙。
They saw that there were two frogs there.

S.FORM: nani yau ti pasaya ti mzaqis tababawan na paRin ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: (他們)穩穩地爬上了那根木頭。
(They) climbed onto the wood steadily.

S.FORM: pasa libeng tmayta nani mwaza ‘nay biat a yau talibeng na na paRin a yau.
S.TRANSL: (他們)往下看，看到樹下有很多隻青蛙。
(They) looked downward and saw many frogs below the wood.

S.FORM: tu taytaanna ti sayza na wiya ti qaniyau nani taytaanna ya biat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們離開，並且看著那些青蛙。
They left, looking at those frogs.

S.FORM: qawiya ti imi zinna tu biat ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 他對那些青蛙說 :「我們要走囉 !」
He said to the frogs, ‘We are leaving!’

S.FORM: yau ti tababawan na na paRin a yau ya biat a yau mniz mazmun.
S.TRANSL: 木頭上就有了很多青蛙。
There are many frogs on that wood.

S.FORM: nayau ma mai ti.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣，沒有了。
That’s all.
